_comment_: Default settings for mdWorX. To customise, COPY this file (do not edit in place) to %APPDATA%\HyperWorX\mdWorX\settings.json and edit your copy. Any visual key set to null falls back to the active theme (light/dark) default. The 'theme' key accepts 'auto' (follow DOpus pane background), 'light', or 'dark'. The 'encoding' key accepts 'auto' (default — BOM detect then strict UTF-8 then fallbackEncoding), 'utf-8', 'utf-16', 'utf-16le', 'utf-16be', 'system', 'cp1250'..'cp1258', 'iso-8859-1', 'iso-8859-2', 'iso-8859-15', 'shift-jis', 'gbk', 'big5', 'euc-kr', 'koi8-r', 'koi8-u'. The 'fallbackEncoding' key uses the same names except 'auto' (defaults to 'system') and is only consulted when encoding is 'auto' and strict UTF-8 decode failed.
